c.f: _xlfn._xlws.FILTER(INDIRECT("'01.File'!$D$" & M1 & ":$Q$" & K1), "Office File No." = INDIRECT("'01.File'!$D$" & M1 & ":$D$" & K1))
_xlfn._xlws.FILTER(INDIRECT("'01_FILE'!$B$" & L1 & ":$Q$" & K1), TRIM('03.ValRepo'!$G$7) = INDIRECT("'01_FILE'!$B$" & L1 & ":$B$" & K1))
_xlfn._xlws.FILTER(INDIRECT("'02.Documents'!$C$" & M11 & ":$P$" & K11),"File ID" = INDIRECT("'02.Documents'!$C$" & M11 & ":$C$" & K11))
_xlfn._xlws.FILTER(INDIRECT("'02 Documents'!$A$" & L11 & ":$P$" & K11), O3 = INDIRECT("'02.Documents'!$A$" & L11 & ":$A$" & K11))
_xlfn._xlws.FILTER(INDIRECT("'03.Property'!$C$" & M21 & ":$AQ$" & K21),"File ID" = INDIRECT("'03.property'!$C$" & M21 & ":$C$" & K21))
_xlfn._xlws.FILTER(INDIRECT("'03 Property'!$A$" & M21 & ":$AQ$" & K21),O3 = INDIRECT("'03 property'!$A$" & M21 & ":$A$" & K21))
_xlfn._xlws.FILTER(INDIRECT("'04.Boundaries'!$C$" & M31 & ":$AA$" & K31),"File ID" = INDIRECT("'04.Boundaries'!$C$" & M31 & ":$C$" & K31))
_xlfn._xlws.FILTER(INDIRECT("'04 Boundaries'!$A$" & M31 & ":$AA$" & K31),O3 = INDIRECT("'04 Boundaries'!$A$" & M31 & ":$A$" & K31))
_xlfn._xlws.FILTER(INDIRECT("'05.Inspections'!$C$" & M41 & ":$AH$" & K41),"File ID" = INDIRECT("'05.Inspections'!$C$" & M41 & ":$C$" & K41))
_xlfn._xlws.FILTER(INDIRECT("'05 Inspections'!$A$" & M41 & ":$AH$" & K41),O3 = INDIRECT("'05 Inspections'!$A$" & M41 & ":$A$" & K41))
CONCATENATE("The property is in a communial area.")
CONCATENATE("High Tension wire lines are passing through the property")
CONCATENATE("The property is in the area that is classified as ",AA42,".")
_xlfn._xlws.FILTER(INDIRECT("'06.Building'!$C$" & M51 & ":$AY$" & K51),"File ID" = INDIRECT("'06.Building'!$C$" & M51 & ":$C$" & K51))
_xlfn._xlws.FILTER(INDIRECT("'06 Building'!$A$" & M51 & ":$AY$" & K51),O3 = INDIRECT("'06 Building'!$A$" & M51 & ":$A$" & K51))
_xlfn._xlws.FILTER(INDIRECT("'07.Photoandloc'!$C$" & M61 & ":$AH$" & K61),"File ID" = INDIRECT("'07.photoandloc'!$C$" & M61 & ":$C$" & K61))
_xlfn._xlws.FILTER(INDIRECT("'07 PhotosandLoc'!$A$" & M61 & ":$AH$" & K61),O3 = INDIRECT("'07 PhotosandLoc'!$A$" & M61 & ":$A$" & K61))

TRUNC(RIGHT(D65, LEN(D65) - FIND(",", D65))) & "° " & TRUNC((RIGHT(D65, LEN(D65) - FIND(",", D65)) - TRUNC(RIGHT(D65, LEN(D65) - FIND(",", D65))))*60) & "' " & ROUND(((RIGHT(D65, LEN(D65) - FIND(",", D65)) - TRUNC(RIGHT(D65, LEN(D65) - FIND(",", D65))))*60 - TRUNC((RIGHT(D65, LEN(D65) - FIND(",", D65)) - TRUNC(RIGHT(D65, LEN(D65) - FIND(",", D65))))*60))*60,2) & """ E"

TRUNC(LEFT(D65, FIND(",", D65) - 1)) & "° " & TRUNC((LEFT(D65, FIND(",", D65) - 1) - TRUNC(LEFT(D65, FIND(",", D65) - 1)))*60) & "' " & ROUND(((LEFT(D65, FIND(",", D65) - 1) - TRUNC(LEFT(D65, FIND(",", D65) - 1)))*60 - TRUNC((LEFT(D65, FIND(",", D65) - 1) - TRUNC(LEFT(D65, FIND(",", D65) - 1)))*60))*60,2) & """ N, " &
TRUNC(RIGHT(D65, LEN(D65) - FIND(",", D65))) & "° " & TRUNC((RIGHT(D65, LEN(D65) - FIND(",", D65)) - TRUNC(RIGHT(D65, LEN(D65) - FIND(",", D65))))*60) & "' " & ROUND(((RIGHT(D65, LEN(D65) - FIND(",", D65)) - TRUNC(RIGHT(D65, LEN(D65) - FIND(",", D65))))*60 - TRUNC((RIGHT(D65, LEN(D65) - FIND(",", D65)) - TRUNC(RIGHT(D65, LEN(D65) - FIND(",", D65))))*60))*60,2) & """ E"
